caption: A man sits at a table in a recording studio, wearing a white baseball cap, large silver headphones, a gold chain, a gold watch, and a black hoodie with the words "BOSS" and "TRE" printed in gold. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a white backdrop featuring a gold star logo and the repeated phrase "UNICORN HUSTLE." To his right, a sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and a logo with the letters "KNL" is visible. On the table sits a black mug with red and white text that includes "TALK ON." A small graphic logo is present in the bottom left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, the man remains stationary, looking slightly to his left with a neutral expression, while the camera and the environment remain completely still.
